Headline: #52 Kedzie Temporary Southbound Reroute near Kedzie/34th
ShortDescription: Southbound 52 Kedzie buses are temp. rerouted via Kedzie, 31st, California, 36th Place, Albany, 36thsreet and Kedzie: due to, street blockage near Kedzie/34th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #52 Kedzie buses are temp. rerouted via Kedzie, 31st, California, 36th Place, Albany, 36thsreet and Kedzie: due to, street blockage near Kedzie/34th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
